Our ʻOhana

24 companies. 950+ applications. One thing in common.

Wāhine who refused to wait.

The data is clear: women-led businesses arenʼt just good for families, theyʼre good for economies. FoundHer companies donʼt just survive, they grow, they hire, and they reinvest in the communities they call home.

{{ o.v }}
{{ o.l }}

“Women entrepreneurs build differently. They hire locally, source ethically, reinvest in their communities, and build enterprises designed to last. When wāhine thrive, whole communities thrive with them.”
